§ 1910.215 Abrasive wheel machinery.
1/4 3/8 5/16 1/2 3/8 steel 4 1/8 1/16 3/8 5/16 3/8 5/16 3/8 5/16 3/8 5/16 3/8 5/16 1/2 3/8 (min. 6 3/16 1/16 1/2 3/8 7/16 3/8 7/16 3/8 7/16 3/8 7/16 3/8 3/4 1/2 tensile 8 1/2 3/8 9/16 7/16 9/16 7/16 9 strength 10 9/16 7/16 5/8 1/2 5/8 1/2 5/8 1/2 5/8 1/2 7/8 5/8 60,000 16 5/8 9/16 3/4 5/8 3/4
